title: jessea megaphylla
intro: Jessea megaphylla, also known as the island 'ōhi'a lehua, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae, that is native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antifungal and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Jessea megaphylla include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
